protocols.Paper_title: Role of DLP12 lysis genes in Escherichia coli biofilm formation
protocols.Evidence: labelled cells were washed; samples were boiled in SDS and filtered; filters were washed before scintillation counting.

protocols.Paper_title: Role of DLP12 lysis genes in Escherichia coli biofilm formation
protocols.Evidence: Cells were described as washed and diluted; label levels were assessed from SDS-boiled cells.
